content: The Hadamard gate (H) creates superposition. It maps |0⟩ to (|0⟩ + |1⟩)/√2 and |1⟩ to (|0⟩ - |1⟩)/√2. In Qiskit: qc.h(qubit_index)
CNOT gate (CX) is a two-qubit gate that flips the target qubit if control qubit is |1⟩. In Qiskit: qc.cx(control_qubit, target_qubit)
To create a QuantumCircuit in Qiskit: from qiskit import QuantumCircuit; qc = QuantumCircuit(num_qubits). You can also specify classical bits: qc = QuantumCircuit(num_qubits, num_classical_bits)
